2603.16974.title: Are a Thousand Words Better Than a Single Picture? Beyond Images -- A Framework for Multi-Modal Knowledge Graph Dataset Enrichment
2603.16974.paper_summary: Multi-Modal Knowledge Graphs (MMKGs) benefit from visual information, yet large-scale image collection is hard to curate and often excludes ambiguous but relevant visuals (e.g., logos, symbols, abstract scenes). We present Beyond Images, an automatic data-centric enrichment pipeline with optional human auditing. This pipeline operates in three stages: (1) large-scale retrieval of additional entity-related images, (2) conversion of all visual inputs into textual descriptions to ensure that ambiguous images contribute usable semantics rather than noise, and (3) fusion of multi-source descriptions using a large language model (LLM) to generate concise, entity-aligned summaries. These summaries replace or augment the text modality in standard MMKG models without changing their architectures or loss functions. Across three public MMKG datasets and multiple baseline models, we observe consistent gains (up to 7% Hits@1 overall). Furthermore, on a challenging subset of entities with visually ambiguous logos and symbols, converting images into text yields large improvements (201.35% MRR and 333.33% Hits@1). Additionally, we release a lightweight Text-Image Consistency Check Interface for optional targeted audits, improving description quality and dataset reliability. Our results show that scaling image coverage and converting ambiguous visuals into text is a practical path to stronger MMKG completion. Code, datasets, and supplementary materials are available at https://github.com/pengyu-zhang/Beyond-Images.
2603.16974.paper_summary_zh: 多模態知識圖譜（MMKGs）受益於視覺信息，但大規模圖像收集難以策劃，且常常排除模糊但相關的視覺資料（例如，標誌、符號、抽象場景）。我們提出了「超越圖像」，這是一個自動化的數據中心增強管道，並提供可選的人類審核。該管道分為三個階段：（1）大規模檢索額外的實體相關圖像，（2）將所有視覺輸入轉換為文本描述，以確保模糊圖像能提供可用的語義而非噪音，以及（3）使用大型語言模型（LLM）融合多來源描述，以生成簡潔的實體對齊摘要。這些摘要在不改變其架構或損失函數的情況下，替代或增強標準MMKG模型中的文本模態。在三個公共MMKG數據集和多個基準模型中，我們觀察到一致的增益（整體最高達7% Hits@1）。此外，對於具有視覺模糊標誌和符號的挑戰性實體子集，將圖像轉換為文本帶來了巨大的改進（201.35% MRR和333.33% Hits@1）。此外，我們釋出了一個輕量級的文本-圖像一致性檢查介面，供可選的針對性審核，改善描述質量和數據集可靠性。我們的結果顯示，擴大圖像覆蓋範圍並將模糊視覺轉換為文本是強化MMKG完成的一條實用途徑。代碼、數據集和補充材料可在 https://github.com/pengyu-zhang/Beyond-Images 獲得。
2603.16974.author: Pengyu Zhang et.al.
2603.16974.authors: Pengyu Zhang, Klim Zaporojets, Jie Liu, Jia-Hong Huang, Paul Groth
